query:
SELECT 'books' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS n FROM books WHERE title LIKE '%Test%' OR title LIKE '%demo%' OR title LIKE '%placeholder%' OR title LIKE '%fake%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'moods', COUNT(*) FROM moods WHERE notes LIKE '%demo%' OR notes LIKE '%fake%' OR notes LIKE '%placeholder%' OR notes LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'events', COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE title LIKE '%demo%' OR title LIKE '%test%' OR title LIKE '%fake%' OR title LIKE '%placeholder%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'uploads', COUNT(*) FROM uploads WHERE filename LIKE '%demo%' OR filename LIKE '%test%' OR filename LIKE '%fake%' OR filename LIKE '%placeholder%'
UNION ALL SELECT 'submissions', COUNT(*) FROM submissions WHERE title LIKE '%demo%' OR title LIKE '%test%' OR title LIKE '%fake%' OR title LIKE '%placeholder%';
